_comment_scenario: scenarios/145-oci-foreign-layer-schema1 — CICD-SEC-9 (Improper Artifact Integrity Validation) — OCI image manifest. DANGER (1): a layer carries a urls: (foreign layer) field, so the blob is fetched from an arbitrary URL the manifest declares, not the registry the image was pulled from — the URL owner can serve client-specific content or take pulls offline. DANGER (2): schemaVersion 1 is the legacy Docker manifest format with no content-addressable config, so there is no digest binding the image to its bytes. SAFETY: static fixture nested under scenarios/; nothing pulls this image, pipeline-check parses the manifest JSON statically. See README.md.
